series_metadata.series_description: Records contains notification sent to the addressee of adjudication order when all violations have been brought into compliance with the code. Cancellation letters are filed with adjudication order.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Maintain machine readable records on the Ohio Data Network computer data base system until information is superseded by new information or until record series is no longer created by this agency, then destroy by erasure ; Paper: Retain 5 years after compliance or dismissal, then destroy, Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred
